name: Nottinghamshire (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: the gold of the central charge

description: A green field with a white cross, charged at the centre with a circular badge depicting Robin Hood drawing his longbow.
history: The result of a public competition organised by Nottinghamshire County Council and the Nottingham Post in 2011, won by Brian Diggle; registered with the Flag Institute on 25 April 2011.

features.symbolism: the green of Sherwood Forest with a white cross
the legendary outlaw of Sherwood Forest, the county's most famous association
